guest_thought_fluff_enteredqueueforfavou.source: I'm queueing for my favourite ride! I can't wait!

guest_thought_fluff_enteredqueueforride_.source: The ride I'm queuing for looks really fun.

guest_thought_parkexit_unhappy_poolpassr.source: I've had my pool pass refunded, what a terrible experience!
